opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I read my results online and it says I have stomach antibodies. My heart is racing, I feel sick, and I'm convinced I'm bleeding internally.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I read it an hour ago and I'm panicking — do I have stomach cancer or a bleed? Should I go to hospital?

symptom_narrative.onset: about an hour ago after reading results
symptom_narrative.character: racing heart, nausea, epigastric tightness, breathing fast
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: nausea, no vomiting blood, no black stools, no fainting, no exertional chest pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get anxious with health scares

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants to be told she doesn't have cancer or a bleed

communication_style.typical_message_style: rapid, fearful, cites what she read
